note: AiStreamRegistry with pre-registration race handled. 3-point cooperative check in all 3 providers + terminal-event gate. Frontend stamps unique UUID + doc/flow context key, checks live store before every event, calls backend cancel on navigation. H-4 bearer gate preserved. Bonus: append-only insertContentAt. Cleanup via unregister with Arc::ptr_eq. Minor: flowDocs key not sorted; cooperative cancellation can leave blocked HTTP read alive but no events leak.
